violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Side of the prep table is bare wood and needs to be sealed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Rubber tongs on used for the hot holding unit were cracked and falling apart.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Shelving above the hand sink in the prep area is missing the trim on the edge and is no longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the prep area and inside on the top of the microwave in the breakfast bar area.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Operator is currently skipping sanitizing step.--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operator currently using single tub sink in breakfast bar area. Operate 3 tub sink as follows... 1) Hot Soapy Water 2) Clear Water Rinse 3) Sanitizing Rinse 4) Air Dry All Utensils
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Hand washing sink was being used to wash dishes in the breakfast bar area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in the prep/dish washing area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
